channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Hantavirus-Stricken Cruise Ship Docks In The Netherlands For Disinfection
item.description: The cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak has docked at the Dutch port of Rotterdam for disinfection, wrapping up a troubled journey that put international health authorities on alert.
item.content:encoded: The cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak has docked at the Dutch port of Rotterdam for disinfection, wrapping up a troubled journey that put international health authorities on alert.

item.title: Apache Choppers, Howitzers: US Clears $428 Million Defence Sale To India

media:content.media:description: The proposed sales would improve India's capability to meet current and future threats

item.description: The approvals come amid expanding defence cooperation between India and the United States, which have steadily deepened military ties over the past decade through arms sales, joint military exercises and technology-sharing initiatives.
item.content:encoded: The approvals come amid expanding defence cooperation between India and the United States, which have steadily deepened military ties over the past decade through arms sales, joint military exercises and technology-sharing initiatives.

item.title: Ebola Alert: US Tightens Curbs After Citizen Tests Positive
item.description: Washington, May 19 (IANS) The Trump administration announced new travel restrictions and emergency measures after an American citizen tested positive for a strain of Ebola in Africa, even as officials stressed there were currently no cases inside the
item.content:encoded: Washington, May 19 (IANS) The Trump administration announced new travel restrictions and emergency measures after an American citizen tested positive for a strain of Ebola in Africa, even as officials stressed there were currently no cases inside the

item.title: Hantavirus Hunt: Argentine Scientists Set First Traps
item.description: Scientists attempting to determine whether or not hantavirus is present in Argentina's Ushuaia on Monday laid the very first traps to catch rodents potentially carrying...
item.content:encoded: Scientists attempting to determine whether or not hantavirus is present in Argentina's Ushuaia on Monday laid the very first traps to catch rodents potentially carrying...

item.title: 'Reports By Ignorant NGOs': India On Press Freedom, Rights Concerns In Oslo

media:content.media:description: The diplomat said India's Constitution guarantees fundamental rights to all citizens

item.description: The diplomat said that people in other countries "have no understanding of the scale of India".
item.content:encoded: The diplomat said that people in other countries "have no understanding of the scale of India".

item.title: PM Modi's Gothenburg Gambit: India Courts European CEOs In Sweden

media:content.media:description: PM Modi's last visit to Sweden was in April 2018

item.description: The Gothenburg meeting was not taking place in isolation. It followed a series of landmark developments in India-EU relations, most notably the conclusion of the long-awaited India-EU Free Trade Agreement -- described by officials as the "Mother of a
item.content:encoded: The Gothenburg meeting was not taking place in isolation. It followed a series of landmark developments in India-EU relations, most notably the conclusion of the long-awaited India-EU Free Trade Agreement -- described by officials as the "Mother of a

item.title: 3 Killed In Shooting At San Diego's Largest Mosque, 2 Teen Suspects Dead

media:content.media:description: San Diego Police Chief Scott Wahl said the case is being investigated as a hate crime.

item.description: The center is the largest mosque in San Diego County and includes the Al Rashid School that offers courses in Arabic language, Islamic studies and the Quran for students ages 5 and up.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1101120/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The center is the largest mosque in San Diego County and includes the Al Rashid School that offers courses in Arabic language, Islamic studies and the Quran for students ages 5 and up.

item.title: The Missile Is Dead. Long Live The Map: How Iran Invented 'Future Of War'
item.description: Iran's weaponisation of the Strait of Hormuz - squeezing energy flows and simultaneously threatening subsea cables - has re-introduced the world to structural leverage warfare and marked it as the future of conflict.
item.content:encoded: Iran's weaponisation of the Strait of Hormuz - squeezing energy flows and simultaneously threatening subsea cables - has re-introduced the world to structural leverage warfare and marked it as the future of conflict.

item.title: Iran Plans $58 Million Bounty For "Whoever Sends Trump, Netanyahu To Hell": Reports

media:content.media:description: Tehran's proposed bounty legislation marks a significant escalation from previous threats

item.description: The Iranian parliament is scheduled to vote on a bill offering rewards for the assassination of Trump and Netanyahu for the February 28 strikes on Tehran that killed the then-supreme leader Ali Khamenei.
item.content:encoded: The Iranian parliament is scheduled to vote on a bill offering rewards for the assassination of Trump and Netanyahu for the February 28 strikes on Tehran that killed the then-supreme leader Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Free ChatGPT Plus For Everyone? Malta Just Became The First Country To Do It

media:content.media:description: The programme will also be open to Maltese citizens living abroad.

item.description: Malta has partnered with OpenAI to provide a free one-year ChatGPT Plus subscription to all citizens and residents aged 14+ who complete a digital literacy course.
item.content:encoded: Malta has partnered with OpenAI to provide a free one-year ChatGPT Plus subscription to all citizens and residents aged 14+ who complete a digital literacy course.

item.title: 7,000 Staff To Shift To AI Roles As Meta Cuts Jobs, Revamps Structure: Report

media:content.media:description: In total, the layoffs and transfers will hit about 20% of the company's workforce

item.description: In the memo, Meta Chief People Officer Janelle Gale told employees the company plans to move 7,000 employees to new initiatives related to AI workflows and to eliminate managerial roles.
item.content:encoded: In the memo, Meta Chief People Officer Janelle Gale told employees the company plans to move 7,000 employees to new initiatives related to AI workflows and to eliminate managerial roles.

item.title: Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI, Jury Finds He 'Waited Too Long'

media:content.media:description: Musk, the world's richest man, was a co-founder of OpenAI.

item.description: Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI, Jury Finds He 'Waited Too Long'
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI, Jury Finds He 'Waited Too Long'

item.title: US Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Holds Off Iran Attack Planned For Tuesday After Gulf Intervention
item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: Cuba Warns Of "Bloodbath" If US Attacks

media:content.media:description: Diaz-Canel repeated that Cuba "poses no threat" to the United States.

item.description: Cuba's leader warned Monday of a "bloodbath" in the event of an American attack, while the US Treasury sanctioned Cuba's main intelligence agency and top leaders as tensions spiked between the arch-foes.
item.content:encoded: Cuba's leader warned Monday of a "bloodbath" in the event of an American attack, while the US Treasury sanctioned Cuba's main intelligence agency and top leaders as tensions spiked between the arch-foes.

item.title: Meta Plans May 20 Layoffs, To Cut 10% Of Its Global Workforce

media:content.media:description: Meta detailed its layoff plans for this week in a memo shared with employees on Monday.

item.description: As part of that, the company plans to move 7,000 employees to new initiatives related to AI workflows and to eliminate managerial roles, she said.
item.content:encoded: As part of that, the company plans to move 7,000 employees to new initiatives related to AI workflows and to eliminate managerial roles, she said.

item.title: Key Moments In Elon Musk Vs OpenAI Trial

media:content.media:description: During trial, Sam Altman recalled Musk once demanding a 90% stake in OpenAI.

item.description: The jury decided Musk waited too long to sue. Musk had sought about $150 billion in damages from OpenAI and Microsoft, a major investor, to be paid to OpenAI's nonprofit. Musk also sought the removal of Altman and Brockman.
item.content:encoded: The jury decided Musk waited too long to sue. Musk had sought about $150 billion in damages from OpenAI and Microsoft, a major investor, to be paid to OpenAI's nonprofit. Musk also sought the removal of Altman and Brockman.

item.title: Trump Holds Off On Planned Iran Strike After Gulf Allies' Request

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said he is holding off on a military strike on Iran planned for Tuesday.

item.description: Trump's announcement in a social media post Monday came as he had threated the clock was ticking for Iran to strike a deal or fighting would renew after a fragile ceasefire.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1101119/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Trump's announcement in a social media post Monday came as he had threated the clock was ticking for Iran to strike a deal or fighting would renew after a fragile ceasefire.

item.title: Team Trump Creates $1.7 Billion Fund For Allies Prosecuted Under Biden

media:content.media:description: Trump has taken a number of punitive measures against perceived enemies

item.description: US President Donald Trump's Justice Department announced on Monday the creation of a $1.7 billion fund to compensate political allies prosecuted under the Biden administration.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump's Justice Department announced on Monday the creation of a $1.7 billion fund to compensate political allies prosecuted under the Biden administration.

item.title: UK Cops Find 90-kg Cocaine In Shipment Of Kim Kardashian's Shapewear Brand

media:content.media:description: The truck driver has been sentenced to 13.5 years in prison.

item.description: A British court sentenced a truck driver to prison for smuggling $9.4 million worth of cocaine in the shipment.
item.content:encoded: A British court sentenced a truck driver to prison for smuggling $9.4 million worth of cocaine in the shipment.

item.title: 4 Dead, 8 Injured As Gunman Opens Fire In Southern Turkey: Report

media:content.media:description: A widespread police manhunt was under way.

item.description: 4 Dead, 8 Injured As Gunman Opens Fire In Southern Turkey: Report
item.content:encoded: 4 Dead, 8 Injured As Gunman Opens Fire In Southern Turkey: Report
